testcase.name: getById_shouldThrowWhenNotFound

Check the community dialects project for available legacy versions. 2026-04-16T02:03:30.069+02:00 WARN 19344 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: PostgreSQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-04-16T02:03:30.703+02:00 INFO 19344 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists earthquakes cascade Hibernate: create table earthquakes ( depth float(53), latitude float(53), longitude float(53), magnitude float(53) not null, fetched_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigserial not null, time timestamp(6) with time zone not null, mag_type varchar(50), place varchar(500) not null, title varchar(500) not null, usgs_id varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-16T02:03:30.739+02:00 INFO 19344 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-16T02:03:31.134+02:00 INFO 19344 --- [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-04-16T02:03:31.679+02:00 WARN 19344 --- [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-04-16T02:03:32.106+02:00 INFO 19344 --- [ main] m.c.e.s.EarthquakeServiceIntegrationTest : Started EarthquakeServiceIntegrationTest in 4.713 seconds (process running for 5.77) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) testcase.name: getById_shouldReturnEarthquake
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

testcase.name: getAfterTime_shouldFilterByTime
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 where e1_0.time>? order by e1_0.time desc

testcase.name: deleteById_shouldThrowWhenNotFound
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select count(*) from earthquakes e1_0 where e1_0.id=?

testcase.name: getByMinMagnitude_shouldFilterCorrectly
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 where e1_0.magnitude>? order by e1_0.time desc

testcase.name: fetchAndStore_shouldClearAndSaveFiltered
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 2026-04-16T02:03:32.591+02:00 INFO 19344 --- [ main] m.c.e.s.impl.EarthquakeServiceImpl : Starting fetch-and-store cycle from USGS API... 2026-04-16T02:03:32.595+02:00 INFO 19344 --- [ main] m.c.e.s.impl.EarthquakeServiceImpl : Filtered 2 earthquakes with magnitude > 2.0 Hibernate: delete from earthquakes 2026-04-16T02:03:32.612+02:00 INFO 19344 --- [ main] m.c.e.s.impl.EarthquakeServiceImpl : Cleared existing earthquake records Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 2026-04-16T02:03:32.620+02:00 INFO 19344 --- [ main] m.c.e.s.impl.EarthquakeServiceImpl : Saved 2 earthquake records to database Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 order by e1_0.time desc

testcase.name: getAfterTime_shouldReturnEmptyWhenNoMatch

testcase.name: getAllEarthquakes_shouldReturnAllOrderedByTimeDesc

testcase.name: deleteById_shouldDeleteEarthquake
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.depth, e1_0.fetched_at, e1_0.latitude, e1_0.longitude, e1_0.mag_type, e1_0.magnitude, e1_0.place, e1_0.time, e1_0.title, e1_0.usgs_id from earthquakes e1_0 Hibernate: insert into earthquakes (depth, fetched_at, latitude, longitude, mag_type, magnitude, place, time, title, usgs_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select count(*) from earthquakes e1_0 where e1_0.id=? 2026-04-16T02:03:32.673+02:00 INFO 19344 --- [ main] m.c.e.s.impl.EarthquakeServiceImpl : Deleted earthquake with id: 30 Hibernate: delete from earthquakes where id=? Hibernate: select count(*) from earthquakes e1_0 where e1_0.id=? Hibernate: select count(*) from earthquakes e1_0

testcase.name: fetchAndStore_shouldPropagateUsgsException

testcase.name: getByMinMagnitude_shouldThrowForNegativeMagnitude
